q: Which is the longest river in the world?
exp: The Nile and the Amazon compete; the Nile is about 6,650 km long.
The Mona Lisa hangs in the Louvre Museum in Paris.

q: Which precious metal has the symbol Ag?
On which continent is the Sahara Desert?
exp: The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world.

q: How many players from one team are on a football pitch?
exp: Ten outfield players plus the goalkeeper.

q: Which language has the most native speakers?
exp: Mandarin Chinese has over a billion native speakers.

q: Which is the largest planet in the solar system?
exp: Jupiter is a gas giant with a great red spot.

q: How many continents are there on Earth?
exp: Africa, North America, South America, Antarctica, Asia, Europe and Oceania.

q: What is the tallest mountain in the world?
exp: Everest is 8,849 m high, in the Himalayas.
Insulin regulates sugar in the blood.

q: Which country has the largest population in the world?
exp: India overtook China in population in 2023.
